meta.description: Index of the data directory: what is stable reference material vs operational/sample datasets.

reference.purpose: Versioned JSON consumed by the application; EDGAR API shapes, taxonomy list, and financial concept model.
reference.regenerate_notes: Merges live SEC companyfacts/submissions/companyconcept data; set USER_AGENT_EMAIL. Preserves hand-authored sections; updates meta.generated_from_edgar and taxonomies list. Use --with-accounting to also merge acct_facts* into generated/us_gaap_account_map.json.

files.name: generated/us_gaap_account_map.json
files.notes: Produced by sync_accounting_reference; merge of data/acct_facts*.csv/json.

datasets.notes: Large or sample exports; not imported automatically unless a management command or script specifies them. acct_facts*.csv/json feed the reference accounting map via sync_accounting_reference.
